creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Veniamin, hello Mel,

there hasn't been an update on this PR on graphics/qiviewer (see [1]) for
quite a while. What is the current state of things here? Does the problem
still exist, or should the PR be closed?

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/168319
